title: Adopt a child from abroad - Canada.ca
content:
## Adopt a child from abroad
Find out how to adopt a child from another country and bring them back to Canada.
- Check processing times
- What do I need to bring my adopted child to Canada?
- Check your application status

## Services and information

### The international adoption process
How to adopt a child from another country

### Restrictions on adoptions
Countries with adoption suspension or restrictions

### Contact an adoption authority
Who to contact to start the international adoption process

### How to bring your adopted child to Canada
How to bring your child to Canada through immigration or citizenship

### Apply for citizenship for your adopted child
Eligibility, how to apply, forms, fees and processing times

### Avoid adoption issues and delays
Adoption issues and delays and how to avoid them

### Apply for permanent residency for your adopted child
Eligibility, how to apply, forms, fees and processing times

### Health and safety advice when travelling for international adoptions
Health and safety considerations when travelling outside Canada for an international adoption

### Tips for toddler’s passport photos
Find out how to take good photos of toddlers for a Canadian passport
- Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
- Global Affairs Canada
